response.justification: The candidate lacks the required 8 years of C++ experience and 5 years of large-scale infrastructure/cloud compute platform experience; their work is predominantly in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, with minimal evidence of cloud compute leadership, distributed systems architecture, or mentoring in cloud/DevOps contexts.
strengths: Strong full-stack versatility across languages and domains
Proven open-source contributions and technical mentoring through workshops
Experience with scalable systems via GISCollective and high-throughput microservices
concerns: No demonstrable 8+ years of C++ experience as required
Lacks documented leadership in cloud compute platforms or distributed systems at scale
Minimal evidence of software architecture ownership or mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers
